panel.placementHint: Dock config panel to an edge

chat.compactingBanner: The session history is large — OpenClaw is summarizing older messages before calling the model. This can take several minutes; it is not frozen.
chat.runEndedNoOutput: The run finished without a reply. The session may be too long for the model — try /new to start fresh, or switch to a larger-context model.
chat.runStoppedAfterStaleStream: The run stopped after a long pause and history was reloaded. A tool or model call may have failed without returning a clear error; check the configuration and retry.
chat.runIssueTitle: This run may have been interrupted
chat.runTimedOut: The run was stopped after reaching the time limit. The reply may be incomplete — click Continue to pick up where it left off.
chat.continueInstruction: Please continue the previous task from where it was interrupted.
chat.contextOverflow: Context overflow — this conversation is too large for the model. Use /new to start a fresh session, or switch to a model with a larger context window.
chat.empty: Start a conversation with your research assistant.

connectionBanner.disconnected: Disconnected — unsent messages may be lost. Check if the gateway is running

chat.toolCallWarning: Current model ({{model}}) may not support tool calls. Commands may not execute and plugins may be unavailable. Consider switching models.
chat.notConnected: Not connected — check if the gateway is running
chat.sendFailed: Send failed — the connection may have dropped. Try resending
chat.staleSessionBannerTitle: This session has been idle too long
chat.staleSessionBannerBody: Sending a message will archive the current transcript and start a new context — the model will not see earlier messages. Continue only if you intend a fresh start.
chat.staleSessionConfirmBody: This session expired under the gateway idle/daily reset policy. Your next message will archive the visible history and the agent will not remember prior turns.
chat.refTooLarge: "{{name}}" exceeds the {{limit}}MB limit and was not ingested
chat.refUploadingHint: Some references are still uploading — please wait
chat.dropBulkContent: This drop contains {{count}} files (~{{size}}MB). Upload all of them?
chat.dropFolderAllFailed: All files in this folder failed to upload
chat.dropFolderPartial: {{failed}}/{{total}} files in the folder failed to upload
chat.attachNoVisionModel: Image attached. The current model can't view images directly — it'll be saved to the workspace and the assistant will try to read it with its tools (e.g. OCR, code). For reliable image understanding, enable a separate vision model in Settings.
chat.inputHistoryTip: Tip: Press ↑↓ in the input box to quickly browse history

taskFlow.title: Task progress
taskFlow.stillWorking: Still working — long steps are normal for complex tasks.

slashCmd.clearFailed: Could not reset transcript on gateway; only cleared this view until reload

providerPicker.searchPlaceholder: Search providers (supports aliases like GLM, Kimi, 豆包)...
providerPicker.addCustomProfileHint: Enter URL, API key, and model in settings below, then Save
providerPicker.unstableWarnBody: This provider may be unstable due to limited maintenance. Use it with caution. We recommend OpenAI, DeepSeek, Kimi, MiniMax, or Zhipu GLM (API and Coding).

library.title: Literature Library
library.linkVsFileHint: The library stores paper metadata and links. For deep reading or review, add the PDF to workspace sources/ and link the local file first.
library.selectCollection: Browse by collection (all papers in set)
library.noCollectionsYet: No collections yet. Create one with the agent (e.g. library_manage_collection).
library.empty: Let your Research-Claw explore a new direction and find papers for you.
library.emptyFiltered: No papers match the current filters.

intraView.title: Ask about this paper
intraView.questionPlaceholder: e.g. What baseline models are compared in Table 2?
intraView.sentHint: Sent to chat — the agent will read this paper and answer with citations
intraView.noPdfWarning: No local PDF linked — answers may rely on abstract only until you attach a workspace file.

tasks.title: Tasks
tasks.empty:
No tasks yet.
Ask the agent to help you plan your research.

askAgent.agentPrompt: Report on the current progress and completion status of task "{{title}}". Include: completed work, obstacles encountered, estimated remaining effort, and next-step recommendations.
askAgent.humanPrompt: Based on the current progress and available information, please provide completion suggestions for task "{{title}}". Include: recommended next steps, resources that may be needed, and guidance on how to complete this task efficiently.
askAgent.mixedPrompt: Report on the current status of task "{{title}}". How is the part I am responsible for progressing? What is the completion status of the part you are handling? What should each of us do next?

gantt.title: Gantt View
gantt.noTasks: No tasks with deadlines to display.

workspace.title: Workspace
workspace.uploadFailedMulti: {{count}} file(s) failed to upload — check file permissions
workspace.uploadBulkContent: This drop contains {{count}} files (~{{size}}MB). Upload all of them?
workspace.empty:
Workspace is empty.
Files will appear here as you and the agent create them.
workspace.dragDrop: Drop files here to add to workspace

contextMenu.openFailed: Failed to open — the file may have been moved or deleted
contextMenu.deleteFailed: Delete failed — the file may be in use or permission denied

workspace.uploadFailed: Upload failed — check file permissions and available disk space
workspace.moveFailed: Move failed — the target folder may not exist or has a name conflict
workspace.renameFailed: Rename failed — check for name conflicts or invalid characters
workspace.createFailed: Creation failed — check folder permissions or name conflicts

preview.title: File Preview
preview.errorTooLarge: File is too large to preview — try opening it with an external editor
preview.errorNotFound: File not found — it may have been moved or deleted by the agent
preview.errorGeneric: Failed to load file — try refreshing or opening externally
preview.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this file?
preview.deleteFailed: Delete failed — the file may be in use or permission denied

paperReview.title: Paper Review
paperReview.subtitle: Select a paper and run a one-click review. Summary here, full report below.
paperReview.disclaimer: Review comments on this workbench are for reference only.
paperReview.emptySelect: Select a paper to start reviewing
paperReview.reviewStarted: Review started — results will appear here

errors.unknown: The background review failed. Please try again.
errors.pollTimeout: Review timed out: the model did not write the report in time.
errors.staleRun: Review was interrupted or timed out. Please run it again.

paperReview.runningHint: Review running in the background — you'll be notified when done…
paperReview.cancelled: Polling stopped. The background agent may still run until it times out.
paperReview.emptyResult: Click Run review to generate a report
paperReview.noReviews: No reviews yet for this file

stagedWriting.title: Staged writing

assistant.runningHint: Sections are written in the background; each finished step adds a message here. For edits, send revision instructions as normal chat.
assistant.completedHint: All steps finished — open files below.
assistant.resumeHint: Send “continue writing” to resume remaining steps.

stagedWriting.intro: Full-paper requests are orchestrated section-by-section; workspace files are the source of truth.
stagedWriting.chatStarted: Built-in staged writing started (6 steps). Completed sections appear below; files go to {{dir}}.
stagedWriting.chatResumed: Staged writing resumed — see progress below.
stagedWriting.chatNoJob: No staged writing job to resume. Send a full-paper writing request first.
stagedWriting.chatAlreadyRunning: Staged writing is already running — see the progress panel below. Send “continue writing” to resume, or click “Scan saved files” in the panel to sync.
stagedWriting.chatWrongSession: This session has no staged writing task. Switch back to the session where you started writing to see progress.
stagedWriting.chatRunningOtherSession: Staged writing is running in another session. Switch to that session to continue.
stagedWriting.topicPlaceholder: e.g. DCE-MRI plus ADC for preoperative TNBC diagnosis
stagedWriting.slugHint: Leave empty to create outputs/drafts/paper-jobId/. Otherwise use outputs/drafts/{slug}/
stagedWriting.runningHint: Current step runs in the background — completed steps are checked automatically.
stagedWriting.partialHint: Some steps finished and are saved in the workspace. Open files or resume remaining steps.

errors.stageTimeout: Step {{stage}} timed out. Check {{path}} in the workspace — if the file exists, click Scan saved files.

monitor.title: Monitors
monitor.disconnected: Connect to gateway to view monitors
monitor.emptyHint: Ask your Research-Claw to set up monitoring for arXiv papers, GitHub repos, RSS feeds, and more.
monitor.addPrompt: I want to set up a new monitor. Help me configure it. Available source types: arXiv, GitHub, RSS, Webpage, OpenAlex, Twitter, Custom.
monitor.askAgentPrompt: Please check and report on the monitor "{{name}}" ({{source}}). Run the scan now and summarize findings.
monitor.deleteConfirmContent: Delete "{{name}}"? It will stop running and all cached results will be lost.

supervisor.title: Control Log
supervisor.disconnected: Connect to gateway to view control logs
supervisor.emptyHint: Control entries will appear here when the quality control checks outputs.

settings.title: Settings
settings.apiKeyWillUpdate: Saving will replace the current API key
settings.apiKeyDeletePending: Saving will clear the previously saved API key
settings.apiKeyMissing: No API key configured for this provider
settings.apiProfilesDesc: Save multiple custom gateways (base URL, API key, model). Switch without re-entering.
settings.apiProfilesEmpty: No saved profiles yet. Add one, fill in the fields below, then Save.
settings.visionModelHint: When enabled, text and images will be processed by different models
settings.systemPromptAppendHint: Saved to openclaw.json and synced to the agent before each message — no Save button needed.
settings.systemPromptAppendPlaceholder: Optional instructions appended to the agent system prompt…
settings.showSystemFilesHint: Show agent prompt files (.ResearchClaw/) and system directories in the workspace file tree
settings.notificationSoundHint: Play a short chime when a new notification arrives
settings.noVisionModelHint: This provider has no preset vision model; type a model name manually
settings.restartHint: Saving writes the config and restarts the gateway; the dashboard reconnects automatically.
settings.saveFailed: Save failed — the gateway may have restarted. Try again
settings.copyFailed: Copy failed — your browser may not support clipboard access
settings.validationMissing: Please enter API URL and model name
settings.restartConfirmContent: Saving will close the gateway and restart it. If the restart fails, please restart manually.
settings.webSearchHint: Requires a search provider API key
settings.webSearchPriorityHint: Web search is L3 priority — the agent prefers academic API tools (arXiv, OpenAlex, etc.) first.
settings.heartbeatHint: Periodic background checks (deadlines, reading reminders). Uses lightweight context to minimize token cost.
settings.supervisorHint: Use an independent model to monitor output quality, automatically detect and correct deviations, protect key memories from loss, and provide comprehensive quality assurance.
settings.supervisorProviderHint: Select a provider different from the main model to ensure independent quality control
settings.supervisorModelHint: The model used for quality control and correction
settings.reviewModeHint: Choose the depth of quality control
settings.reviewModeFilterDesc: Only filter dangerous content (fabricated citations, sensitive data, dangerous commands). No course correction.
settings.reviewModeCorrectDesc: Safety filtering + deviation detection + consistency checking + target conclusion tracking
settings.reviewModeFullDesc: Auto-correction + key memory protection during context compaction + memory loss detection
settings.appendReviewToChannelOutputHint: When enabled, control footers are appended to messages delivered via external channels (Telegram, WeChat, etc.). Dashboard users see control results in the Quality Control panel.
settings.deviationThresholdHint: Trigger course correction when deviation score exceeds this value
settings.deviationThresholdTooltip: Score from 0-1. When the reviewer model judges the main model's output deviates from the research goal beyond this threshold, course correction is triggered. 0.3 = more sensitive, 0.7 = more lenient. Default: 0.5
settings.forceRegenerateHint: When enabled, deviated output will be blocked and the model will regenerate corrected content
settings.maxRegenerateAttemptsHint: Maximum number of regeneration attempts per session when deviation persists
settings.maxRegenerateAttemptsTooltip: When deviation exceeds the threshold and force regeneration is enabled, this is the maximum number of regeneration attempts per session. After this limit, warnings are issued instead of blocking output
settings.supervisorSaveHint: Save config and restart for changes to take effect
settings.supervisorGoalPending: Goal pending — control model will parse on next message
settings.supervisorNoTargets: No target conclusions set yet — they will be auto-generated when you start a research task
settings.updateUpToDate: You are on the latest release
settings.updateApplyDesc: Automatically pulls the latest changes and rebuilds the project. It may take several minutes — keep the gateway running. Restart Research-Claw when finished.
settings.updateCheckPartial: Could not reach GitHub; you can still pull manually
settings.restartConfirmDesc: All active conversations will be interrupted. The gateway will recover automatically in a few seconds.

setup.title: Welcome to Research-Claw
setup.subtitle: Configure your AI research assistant to get started
setup.apiKeyExisting: Existing key preserved — enter new to replace
setup.openaiCodexOauthHint: To use OpenAI ChatGPT OAuth, run: openclaw models auth login --provider openai. Then select provider openai and save.
setup.visionModelHint: When enabled, text and images will be processed by different models
setup.proxyHint: If your network requires a proxy to reach AI APIs, enter it here. Takes effect after gateway restart.
setup.restartHint: After saving, the gateway will restart automatically. The dashboard reconnects on its own.
setup.configureFailed: Configuration failed — check the API URL and key, then try again

boot.gatewayHint: Make sure the OpenClaw gateway is running: openclaw gateway --force
boot.needsTokenHint: Enter the gateway token to connect. Find it in Docker logs or your .env file.
boot.tokenGuide:
How to find your token:
1. Default token is research-claw — click the link above to try it
2. Run docker logs research-claw to see the token in startup logs
3. Check your config file: gateway.auth.token field

oauth.step1Desc: Click the button to open the authentication page. Log in and authorize access.
oauth.googleClientIdDesc: Optional if Gemini CLI or OPENCLAW_GEMINI_OAUTH_CLIENT_ID is already configured. To avoid local CLI installation, paste your Google desktop-app OAuth Client ID here.
oauth.googleClientSecretDesc: Optional. Usually not needed for Google desktop-app OAuth clients, but you can paste it if your client configuration requires one.
oauth.step2Desc: After authentication, your browser will redirect to a URL starting with http://localhost:1455/... — copy the full URL from your browser's address bar and paste it below.
oauth.googleStep2Desc: After authentication, your browser will redirect to a URL starting with http://localhost:8085/oauth2callback?... — the page may fail to load, which is expected. Copy the full URL from your browser's address bar and paste it below.
oauth.success: Authentication successful! Token has been saved. You can now save your settings.
oauth.successSaving: Authentication successful! Saving settings and restarting gateway…
oauth.successTokenSaved: Authentication successful! Token saved, but settings save failed. Please click the save button manually.

paper.noIdentifier: Paper has no DOI, arXiv ID, or URL
paper.addFailed: Failed to add paper to library

cron.deleteSessionConfirm: Remove this scheduled task? The gateway cron job will be stopped (when matched) and the chat session will be deleted.

project.deleteConfirm: Delete this session? Chat history will be lost.
project.clearConfirmContent: The session will start fresh: chat history is cleared while the name, model and other settings are kept. The old transcript file stays on disk but is no longer viewable in the UI.
project.sessionHelp: Each session is an independent conversation thread with its own history. Different sessions run in parallel without blocking each other. Use multiple sessions to work on different tasks simultaneously.

error.title: Something went wrong — click Retry or refresh the page

docker.description: Research-Claw is running inside a Docker container. Files cannot be opened with host applications directly.
docker.copyFailed: Copy failed — your browser may not support clipboard access
docker.downloadFailed: Download failed — check your network connection to the gateway
docker.bindMountHint: Tip: change your docker-compose.yml to a bind mount so you can browse workspace files from the host:

extensions.title: Extensions
extensions.disconnected: Connect to gateway to view extensions

workshop.hint: Governed skill creation via OpenClaw Skill Workshop: propose, review, then apply. Applied skills land in workspace/skills and appear in the Skills tab. Agents can also use the skill_workshop tool in chat.
workshop.searchPlaceholder: Search skill name, description, or proposal ID
workshop.empty: No proposals yet. Ask the assistant to create a skill in chat, or click New proposal.
workshop.rejectConfirm: Rejected proposals cannot be applied. Continue?
workshop.quarantineConfirm: Quarantined proposals need a security review before proceeding.
workshop.createIncomplete: Name, description, and body are required
workshop.chatHandoff: Use skill_workshop to inspect proposal {{id}} (skill {{name}}). Revise if needed, then apply when ready.
workshop.chatHandoffHint: Message placed in the composer — send when ready

ppt.hint: Select a source file and submit, Research-Claw will generate PPT automatically.
ppt.projectNameInvalid: Only letters, numbers, underscore, dash, and dot are allowed
ppt.formatTooltip: Canvas format determines the dimensions and aspect ratio of the generated content. Choose based on your use case.
ppt.submitConfirmContent: Research-Claw will start generating the PPT. Please do not submit repeatedly.
ppt.sourceFileSelect: Select source file from workspace outputs
ppt.outputHint: After generation, open the newest PPTX under workspace/outputs/ppt/.
ppt.openDockerFallback: Cannot open directly in Docker. Use the container path shown in the result.

skills.title: Skills
skills.updateFailed: Skill update failed — the gateway may be restarting. Try again shortly
skills.openFailed: Failed to open — the file may have been moved or deleted

channels.title: Channels
channels.emptyHint: Ask the agent to help you configure a messaging channel.
channels.toggleFailed: Channel toggle failed — the gateway may be restarting. Try again shortly
channels.deleteConfirmContent: Delete {{channel}}? The channel configuration will be removed.
channels.deleteFailed: Channel delete failed — the gateway may be restarting. Try again shortly
channels.qrLoginFailed: QR login failed — the code may have expired. Tap Retry to scan again

plugins.title: Plugins
plugins.toggleFailed: Plugin toggle failed — the gateway may be restarting. Try again shortly
